summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of missiAI production polish features including 404 page, legal pages (privacy/terms), global footer, meta tags, and navigation

integration_issues.issue: Back-to-home navigation from legal pages occasionally fails to navigate

passed_tests: 404 page at /nonexistent-url displays branded 404 page with correct 'This page doesn't exist' message
404 page 'Back to missi.space' button links to / and navigates correctly
Privacy Policy page at /privacy loads with all required sections: data collected, data usage, third-party services, retention, rights, contact
Terms of Service page at /terms loads with all required sections: acceptance, product description, acceptable use, availability, IP, termination, governing law, contact
Legal pages have back-to-home navigation link at top left with correct href='/'
Global footer contains links to Privacy Policy (/privacy), Terms of Service (/terms), and GitHub
Footer privacy link navigates correctly to /privacy
Footer terms link navigates correctly to /terms
Footer GitHub link has correct href='https://github.com/rudrasatani13/missiAI' and target='_blank'
Meta tags include correct title 'missiAI — AI with Memory'
Meta description contains voice AI assistant information
Open Graph tags properly configured with missiAI title and description
Landing page renders correctly with hero section, features, and footer
Contact email rudrasatani@missi.space correctly displayed and linked in both legal pages
Governing law section correctly mentions India and Gujarat jurisdiction
Privacy policy covers all required data handling aspects
Terms of service includes proper legal disclaimers and usage guidelines
Loading animations present on page (animate-pulse elements found)
